name: Pulsar X2H Mini Gaming Mouse - Super Clear Edition - 52g Ultra Lightweight - 1ms Polling Rate - 26000 DPI PixArt PAW3395 Sensor - 32-bit Nordic MCU - Optical Switches - Wireless 2.4GHz Adapter - Wired USB (PX2H1CL)
